title: heterotheca sessiliflora
intro: Heterotheca sessiliflora, also known as the Yellow Bird's Eye or Yellow Hill, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, native to the southern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heterotheca sessiliflora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
